name: ideal-direct
description: Ideal Direct internal Claude Code skills — branded document generation and related employee tooling.

metadata.description: Ideal Direct internal Claude Code skills — branded document generation and related employee tooling.

plugins.name: idl-brand-documents
plugins.description: Generate branded Ideal Direct A4 HTML/PDF documents — QC reports, compliance briefs, label checks, supplier comms, listing checks, document registers, trend summaries. Includes a one-time onboarding interview.

plugins.name: goal
plugins.description: Set a completion condition; Claude keeps working until met. Emulates the built-in /goal command (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/goal) for environments where it isn't yet available — Claude desktop Code tab, Claude Code below 2.1.x.
